Amurot

AI-assisted utility apps for calm productivity.

Minimal tools that feel invisible — practical, elegant, and quietly intelligent.

View apps

About Amurot

Amurot is an app-first technology brand building intelligent, minimal utility apps that solve real-life problems.

The philosophy is simple: reduce friction, keep interfaces quiet, and let subtle intelligence handle the rest — so the tool disappears and the work stays in focus.

Philosophy

Less noise. More clarity.

Tools that think with you.

Practical intelligence, quietly delivered.

Product vision

A small ecosystem of focused utilities — each one designed to remove friction from everyday work.

Apps are in development.
